name: PDD 快捷提交
description: Submit Pinduoduo team codes to multiple mirror sites at once. First success returns immediately with score display.

localizedDescriptions.en: Paste 9-digit (or 9N) Pinduoduo team codes and submit to multiple helper sites in parallel. Returns as soon as any site succeeds (CODE_DEADLINE 5s). Shows success count as N/3.
localizedDescriptions.zh: 粘贴拼多多 9 位（或 9N 连写）组队码，并行提交到多个互助站点。任一站点成功即立即返回（单码总时限 5 秒），结果用成功数/总数（如 1/3）显示。支持快捷指令文本输入。
